goal: is_pmf[T](pmf.support, pmf.mass) = (forall(x0: T) { Real.0 <= pmf.mass(x0) } and finite_set_sum[T, Real](pmf.support, pmf.mass) = Real.1)
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { (forall(x2: T0) { Real.0 <= x0(x2) } and finite_set_sum[T0, Real](x1, x0) = Real.1) = is_pmf[T0](x1, x0) }[T](pmf.mass, pmf.support)
(forall(x0: T) { Real.0 <= pmf.mass(x0) } and finite_set_sum[T, Real](pmf.support, pmf.mass) = Real.1)

goal: is_pmf[T](pmf.support, pmf.mass) = (forall(x0: T) { Real.0 <= pmf.mass(x0) } and finite_set_sum[T, Real](pmf.support, pmf.mass) = Real.1)
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { (forall(x2: T0) { Real.0 <= x0(x2) } and finite_set_sum[T0, Real](x1, x0) = Real.1) = is_pmf[T0](x1, x0) }[T](pmf.mass, pmf.support)
